title: Icy Indulgent Japanese Rice Inari-Style Sushi
description: A creamy and indulgent Japanese-inspired sushi dish, featuring pickled vegetables and a nuka-pickle sauce, perfect for a Tohoku-style brunch.
instructions: Prepare the nuka-pickle sauce by mixing together nuka-pickle sauce, sugar, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
Cook the Japanese short-grain rice according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and sauté the sliced cucumbers and carrots until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix together the pickled ginger, mozzarella cheese, and gluten-free soy sauce.
To assemble the inari-style sushi, place a small amount of cooked rice onto a piece of nori seaweed.
Add a spoonful of the nuka-pickle sauce and a few slices of the pickled vegetables on top of the rice.
Fold the nori seaweed over the filling to form a pouch.
Serve the sushi in a ceramic tagine, garnished with sesame seeds and a drizzle of wine vinegar.
